summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field (offset 0x19 in the header) must hold the exact value 0x03, the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant, so that the equality test png_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at pngrutil.c:4457 evaluates true (also requires PNG_EXPAND set so the enclosing block at 4455 is entered).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 cmplog winner-resolving seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19, and the branch true side fired in all 10 (W L4457 T=10 F=0); cmplog discovered the resolving seed at 7s.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The naive loser-blocking seeds never hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 (they carry 0x00 x8 and 0x04 x2), so the equality never matches and the branch stays on the false side in all 10 trials (L L4457 T=0 F=10), keeping naive blocked for 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the integer CMP at pngrutil.c:4457 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp, records both operands (the runtime color_type byte and the constant 0x03), and I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant 0x03 into the input at the offset where the current color_type byte appears; naive has only havoc/token mutators and no CMP introspection, so it must blindly land 0x03 on the single color_type byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of color_type against the PALETTE constant on the globally blocked true side.
Winner-resolving seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19 while loser-blocking seeds carry 0x00 (mostly) or 0x04.
The blocker true side fired in all 10 winner trials and zero loser trials.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L4457  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (png_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog resolved the branch 9/10 and naive blocked 10/10 with naive losing ~20.7h.
cmplog discovered a winner-resolving seed carrying 0x03 at offset 0x19 very early (7s).
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand, which naive lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, only havoc and token mutations.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 4078 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 282c4c4b85d3af6c` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 of the ancestor chain; tool reported 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 3' indicating an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type == 0x03 where cmplog and naive resolve the branch at statistically equal rates and times, showing the single-byte equality is not what gives cmplog its advantage.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the gate is purely the single color_type byte or also depends on PNG_EXPAND being set upstream (line 4455), which would make the resolving condition multi-byte rather than a clean one-byte I2S substitution.
